examples: pluck the flowers off the bush

meanings.definition: sell something to or obtain something from by energetic and especially underhanded activity
rip off; ask an unreasonable price
pull lightly but sharply with a plucking motion
examples: he plucked the strings of his mandolin

meanings.definition: of a stringed instrument; sounded with the fingers or a plectrum
having the feathers removed, as from a pelt or a fowl
